summary: VERIFIED: Masked values (₹*****) feature for Accountant Dashboard is working. Super Admin sees all values unmasked. Click-to-reveal for 10 seconds works correctly. Fixed bug where Approvals tab table amounts were not using MaskedValue component.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Masked values feature verified complete. MaskedValue component uses React Context (MaskContext) at line ~65-107 in AccountsBoard.jsx. Super Admin (role=super_admin) always sees values. Accountant (role=accountant) sees ₹***** with Eye icon.

features_tested.1_accountant_dashboard_masked: PASS - Cashbook tab shows ₹***** for all financial amounts (overview cards, mode cards, expense categories, income table, expense table)
features_tested.2_super_admin_unmasked: PASS - Super Admin sees actual ₹ amounts (no masking) on Accounts Board
features_tested.3_click_to_reveal: PASS - Accountant can click masked value, it reveals for 10 seconds, then auto-hides
features_tested.4_approvals_tab_masked: PASS - Approvals tab summary cards show ₹***** for Accountant
features_tested.5_project_summary_masked: PASS - Project Summary tab totals and table rows show ₹***** for Accountant
features_tested.6_cre_payment_collect_api: PASS - POST /api/payment-stages/{id}/collect creates income with status=pending_approval
features_tested.7_accountant_unified_approvals: PASS - GET /api/approvals/unified returns pending income with correct structure

bugs_fixed.issue: Income amounts in Approvals tab table were using fmtFull() instead of MaskedValue component
Expense amounts in ApprovalExpenseTable were using fmtFull() instead of MaskedValue

masking_implementation_notes.context: MaskContext (line 66) - React Context stores user role
masking_implementation_notes.behavior_super_admin: alwaysVisible=true, shows actual ₹ amount without Eye icon
masking_implementation_notes.behavior_accountant: alwaysVisible=false, shows ₹***** with Eye icon, click to reveal for 10s
